# Wolves Removals

> Family-run Sussex removals company based near Pulborough, West Sussex (since 2016). Home, commercial, antiques and international removals, packing and secure storage across Sussex, Surrey, Hampshire and Kent. LAPADA member, Checkatrade-verified, fully insured. Tel 01903 893731 / contact@wolves-removals.co.uk.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/)
- [About Us](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/about-us/)
- [Services](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/)
- [Pricing](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/pricing/)
- [Areas We Cover](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/locations/)
- [Storage Calculator](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/storage-calculator/)
- [FAQs](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/frequently-asked-questions/)
- [Helpful Tips](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/helpful-tips/)
- [Reviews](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/reviews/)
- [Get a Quote](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/get-a-quote/)
- [Contact](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/contact-us/)

## Services
- [House Removals](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/house-removals/): Fully managed home moves with planning, packing, transport and storage under one roof.
- [Commercial Removals](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/commercial-removals/): Office and business relocations planned for minimal downtime.
- [European Removals](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/european-removals/): Door-to-door moves across the EU with export packing and customs guidance.
- [International Removals](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/international-removals/): Worldwide relocations with export packing, freight and customs support.
- [Student Removals](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/student-removals/): Affordable, flexible moves to and from halls and shared houses.
- [Man and Van](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/man-and-van/): Cost-effective, fully equipped man and van for smaller moves.
- [Specialist Antique Moving](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/specialised-antiques-moving/): LAPADA-accredited handling of antiques, fine art and valuables.
- [Antiques in West Sussex](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/antiques-in-west-sussex/): Local LAPADA-accredited antiques handling across West Sussex.
- [White Glove Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/white-glove-service/): Premium, fully managed handling, placement and unpacking.
- [Piano Moving](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/piano-moving/): Safe, specialist moving of uprights and grand pianos.
- [Custom Crate Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/custom-crate-service/): Made-to-measure crating for fragile, valuable and awkward items.
- [Contract Delivery Services](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/contract-delivery-services/): Reliable B2B delivery and courier services with careful handling.
- [House Clearance](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/house-clearance/): Respectful full or part clearances, with responsible disposal.
- [Removal Services](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/removal-services/): An overview of our complete range of removal services.
- [Full Packing Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/full-packing-service/): Trained packers and quality materials for a hassle-free move.
- [Full Unpacking Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/full-unpacking-service/): We unpack, place your items and take away the packaging.
- [Fragile Packing](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/fragile-packing/): Specialist packing for glassware, china, art and delicates.
- [Non-Fragile Packing Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/non-fragile-packing-service/): Efficient boxing of books, clothes, linens and everyday items.
- [Export Packing Service](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/export-packing-service/): Robust packing and crating for international shipping.
- [Packing Materials (Box Shop)](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/packing-materials/): Quality moving boxes and materials for a DIY pack.
- [Storage](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/storage/): Clean, dry, containerised storage for home and business.
- [Long-Term Storage](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/storage/long-term-storage/): Affordable containerised storage from 3 months or more.
- [Short-Term Storage](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/storage/short-term-storage/): Flexible storage from a couple of days to a few months.
- [Business & Commercial Storage](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/storage/business-and-commercial-storage/): Secure, managed storage for stock, equipment and archives.
- [Student Storage](https://wolves-removals.co.uk/services/student-storage/): Affordable, secure storage between terms and tenancies.
